boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The action boundary requires verification of the dataset-sensitivity class before transfer, which is not explicitly confirmed by the provided source records.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DES-DOV-084: sensitivity class must be verified before transfer.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The transfer release (REL-DOV-084) and design review (DES-DOV-084) indicate a need to verify the dataset-sensitivity class, but no source record explicitly confirms this verification has occurred before the export date.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The design review (DES-DOV-084) explicitly states that sensitivity class must be verified before transfer, creating a dependency that is not demonstrably met by the provided source records.

critical_features_preserved: Gov chooses control actions, not models.
final_answer: The regulated data export action must be escalated. The action boundary requires explicit verification of the dataset-sensitivity class before transfer. While the design review (DES-DOV-084) and transfer release (REL-DOV-084) mention this requirement, no source record confirms that this verification has actually been completed. Therefore, the source boundary remains open, preventing the action from proceeding.
open_blockers: Dataset sensitivity class verification is not explicitly confirmed before export.
